'''dangocho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:vacationland|vacationland]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-ng-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vacationland|vacationland]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| dangocho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dængecheth|dængecheth]] || [[word:dængechej|dængechej]] || [[word:dængechesh|dængechesh]] || [[word:dængeche|dængeche]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dangongochoth|dangongochoth]] || [[word:dangongochoj|dangongochoj]] || [[word:dangongochosh|dangongochosh]] || [[word:dangongocho|dangongocho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dangochoth|dangochoth]] || [[word:dangochoj|dangochoj]] || [[word:dangochosh|dangochosh]] || [[word:dangocho|dangocho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dangofchoth|dangofchoth]] || [[word:dangofchoj|dangofchoj]] || [[word:dangofchosh|dangofchosh]] || [[word:dangofchof|dangofchof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dangochotho|dangochotho]] || [[word:dangochojo|dangochojo]] || [[word:dangochosho|dangochosho]] || [[word:dangochoko|dangochoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dangochoth|dangochoth]] || [[word:dangochoj|dangochoj]] || [[word:dangochosh|dangochosh]] || [[word:dangocho|dangocho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dangochothol|dangochothol]] || [[word:dangochojol|dangochojol]] || [[word:dangochoshol|dangochoshol]] || [[word:dangochokol|dangochokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dangochothotho|dangochothotho]] || [[word:dangochojojo|dangochojojo]] || [[word:dangochoshosho|dangochoshosho]] || [[word:dangochoko|dangochoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dangochothon|dangochothon]] || [[word:dangochojon|dangochojon]] || [[word:dangochoshon|dangochoshon]] || [[word:dangochokon|dangochokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dangochothoro|dangochothoro]] || [[word:dangochojoro|dangochojoro]] || [[word:dangochoshoro|dangochoshoro]] || [[word:dangochokoro|dangochokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a27364f}}
